allow:
Bash(git commit -m "fix: correct CSS variable syntax in Tailwind classes

Fixed invalid Tailwind arbitrary value syntax causing Vercel deployment error.

## Problem
- Vercel deployment showing ''An error occurred loading this page''
- Invalid Tailwind syntax: text-[--muted], bg-[--success]
- CSS variables in @apply context not properly escaped

## Solution
- Changed text-[--muted] → color: var(--muted)
- Changed bg-[--success] → background: var(--success)
- Extracted placeholder styles to ::placeholder pseudo-element
- Separated hover states for btn-ghost

## Fixed Classes
1. .btn-ghost - Split into base + :hover
2. .btn-success - Use background property
3. .input - Use color property + ::placeholder

## Result
✅ Build passes successfully
✅ All 64 pages compile
✅ CSS variables properly applied
✅ Vercel deployment will work

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: improve text contrast on white background across all dashboards

Fixed unreadable white/light gray text on white backgrounds by converting to CSS variables.

## Problem
After implementing white corporate theme (#F7F8FA background), text using these classes became invisible:
- text-white (white text on white background)
- text-gray-100, text-gray-200, text-gray-300 (very light grays)

## Solution
Replaced all instances with inline CSS variable styles:
- Primary text: style={{ color: ''var(--text)'' }} → #111827 (dark gray)
- Secondary text: style={{ color: ''var(--muted)'' }} → Muted gray

## Files Fixed (6 Dashboard Pages)
✅ src/app/dashboard/sekreter/page.tsx
✅ src/app/dashboard/system-admin/page.tsx
✅ src/app/dashboard/mudur/page.tsx
✅ src/app/dashboard/mudur-yardimcisi/page.tsx
✅ src/app/dashboard/instructor/page.tsx
✅ src/app/dashboard/bolum-baskani/page.tsx

## Changed Elements
- Stat card values (3xl font-bold)
- Stat card labels (text-xs uppercase)
- Section headings (h2, h3 elements)
- Quick action titles
- Quick action descriptions
- Banner text and user greetings
- Empty state messages

## Result
✅ All text now readable on white background
✅ Consistent color scheme across dashboards
✅ Maintains V1 flat design aesthetic
✅ Build passes successfully

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: improve text contrast in schedule grid and program management pages

Fixed white/light gray text on white backgrounds in schedule-related components.

## Problem
After white theme implementation, several schedule-related pages had unreadable text:
- ScheduleGrid table headers and cells (instructor names, course names, time slots)
- Schedule program page titles and headings
- Modal dialog headers

## Solution
Replaced light-colored text classes with CSS variable styles in:

### ScheduleGrid.tsx
- Instructor legend badges: text-gray-300 → color: var(--text)
- Table day headers: text-gray-200 → color: var(--text)
- Time slot labels: text-gray-300 → color: var(--text)
- Time slot end times: text-gray-600 → color: var(--muted)
- Course names in cells: text-gray-200 → color: var(--text)

### sekreter/schedule/page.tsx
- Page title: text-white → color: var(--text)
- Page description: text-gray-400 → color: var(--muted)
- Section headings: text-gray-200 → color: var(--text)
- Loading state text: text-white → color: var(--text)
- Empty state headings: text-gray-200 → color: var(--text)
- Modal dialog title: text-white → color: var(--text)

## Result
✅ All schedule grid content now readable
✅ Clear instructor names and course titles
✅ Proper contrast for table headers and time slots
✅ Consistent color scheme across schedule management
✅ Build passes successfully

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: convert schedule grid to corporate red/white theme

Removed gray tones and implemented Rumeli University corporate colors (#B71C1C red + white).

## Problem
Schedule grid had monotonous gray backgrounds and colors that didn''t match corporate identity.

## Changes

### Table Headers
- Time column: Dark gray → Corporate red (#B71C1C) background with white text
- Day headers: Dark gray → Light red (#FFF5F5) background with dark text
- Borders: Gray tones → Clean border system (var(--border))

### Table Body
- Row backgrounds: Dark alternating grays → Clean white/light gray (var(--surface), var(--surface-2))
- Time cells: Dark gray → Light red (#FFEBEE) background
- Cell borders: Consistent light borders throughout

### Course Cards
- Background: Gradient with instructor colors → Clean white (var(--surface))
- Border: Gray tones → Corporate red left border (3px)
- Course code: Instructor color → Corporate red
- Program badge: Dark gray → Light background with proper border
- Instructor/Classroom icons: Various colors → Red and blue dots
- Delete button border: Dark gray → White

### Legend Section
- Background: Dark gray → Light gray (var(--surface-2))
- Instructor badges: Dark backgrounds → Clean white cards with red dots
- Text colors: Properly using CSS variables

## Result
✅ Professional corporate look matching Rumeli University brand
✅ Clean white/red color scheme throughout
✅ Better readability with proper contrast
✅ Consistent with iruFoodFlow design language
✅ No more monotonous grays
✅ Build passes successfully

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
